case_title: DEAN JOSEPH VS ELBETHEL TERRACE INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,850.00 FILED BY DEAN JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT ELBETHEL TERRACE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ELBETHEL TERRACE INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEAN JOSEPH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ELBETHEL TERRACE INC. EACH PARTY ASSUMES OWN COSTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
